body:
## Problem
`api/meta/[...path].js` was updated by #1350 to add SSR meta to tool pages. Two pages already have WebApplication JSON-LD: `/tools/gear-search` (line ~645) and `/tools/dream-set-builder` (line ~660). Four sitemapped pages with priority 0.9â€“0.95 still lack any `articleSchema`:

| Page | Sitemap priority | SSR meta | JSON-LD schema |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/tools/tier-list` | 0.95 | âś… #1350 | âťŚ missing |
| `/tools/name-generator` | 0.95 | âś… #1350 | âťŚ missing |
| `/kit-quiz` | 0.9 | âś… #799 | âťŚ missing |
| `/guess-the-kit` | 0.95 | âś… #799 | âťŚ missing |

Without `@type: WebApplication`, Google cannot classify these pages for app/software rich results, and AI assistants can't resolve 'metal drum kit quiz site' queries to MetalForge.

## Action
In `api/meta/[...path].js`, add `articleSchema` to each of the 4 existing handler blocks:

```javascript
// /tools/tier-list â€” add to existing block
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebApplication',
  name: 'Metal Drummer Tier List',
  applicationCategory: 'GameApplication',
  url: `${BASE_URL}/tools/tier-list`,
  operatingSystem: 'Any',
  description: 'Create your own metal drummer tier list ranking S to D tier.',
})

// /tools/name-generator â€” add to existing block
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebApplication',
  name: 'Metal Drummer Name Generator',
  applicationCategory: 'UtilitiesApplication',
  url: `${BASE_URL}/tools/name-generator`,
  operatingSystem: 'Any',
})

// /kit-quiz â€” add to existing block
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebApplication',
  name: 'Metal Drummer Kit Style Quiz',
  applicationCategory: 'GameApplication',
  url: `${BASE_URL}/kit-quiz`,
  operatingSystem: 'Any',
})

// /guess-the-kit â€” add to existing block
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebApplication',
  name: 'Guess the Kit â€” Metal Drummer Trivia Game',
  applicationCategory: 'GameApplication',
  url: `${BASE_URL}/guess-the-kit`,
  operatingSystem: 'Any',
})
```

## Files to touch
- `api/meta/[...path].js` â€” add `articleSchema` to 4 existing handler blocks (no new handlers needed)

## Expected page count
4 pages gain structured data (atomic addition to existing handlers)

## Quality gate
- Confirm no existing `articleSchema` in those 4 blocks before adding
- Use `'GameApplication'` for quizzes, `'UtilitiesApplication'` for generators/tools
- Stringify the schema object (matches pattern of gear-search/dream-set-builder blocks)

## Estimated organic uplift
Enables Software/App rich result eligibility. Surfaces MetalForge in AI responses to 'metal drum quiz', 'find my drum style quiz', 'metal drummer name generator' queries.

## Verify
1. Diff confirms 4 handler blocks each gained `articleSchema`
2. Google Rich Results Test on `/kit-quiz` â†’ WebApplication detected
3. Same check: `/guess-the-kit`, `/tools/tier-list`, `/tools/name-generator`
4. No regression on `/tools/gear-search` or `/tools/dream-set-builder` (already have schema)
5. Valid JSON-LD (no stringify errors)

## Done
4 handler blocks in `api/meta/[...path].js` each include `articleSchema` with `@type: WebApplication`.
title: SEO batch: add WebApplication JSON-LD to remaining tool + quiz pages (~4 pages)
